use_cases: Confirmation dialogs before destructive actions like deletions or data loss
Alerting users to important information before proceeding
Requesting user acknowledgment of terms or policies
Collecting final confirmation before form submissions
Displaying warnings or important notices in applications
ai_summary: A functional alert/confirmation dialog component built with Ark UI featuring backdrop blur overlay, smooth open/close animations, dark mode support, and accessible focus management. Displays a title, descriptive message, and action buttons for user confirmation workflows.
